# Codantrix Labs

> One-person agentic AI studio. Production agentic systems for SaaS founders and seed–Series B teams, shipped on fixed-price engagements with weekly demos.

Codantrix Labs is the studio of Hassan Ali Mehdi, a solo operator based in Lahore, Pakistan. Six years shipping production software, full-time on agentic AI since 2023. Entity registered with SECP Pakistan.

## Who I work with

- Solo SaaS founders and 1–10 person startups — Tier B engagements ($8–15K, 2–6 weeks)
- Ops and product leads at seed–Series B companies — Tier A engagements ($15–30K+, 6–10 weeks)

## Services (all fixed-price)

### Tier B — Agentic MVPs ($8–15K, 2–6 weeks)

- **AI Feature Add-on — $8K, 2–3 weeks** — One AI feature added to an existing SaaS (classification, summarization, extraction, or a single agent behind a chat surface)
- **Agentic MVP — $12K, 4–6 weeks** — A working agentic system from zero: one agent, 3–6 tools, real data, usable UI, production deployment
- **Custom (Tier B) — from $15K** — Scoped per project on the call

### Tier A — Agentic Production Systems ($15–30K+, 6–10 weeks)

- **Agentic Workflow — $15K, 6 weeks** — Production agentic workflow inside an existing product: multi-step agent, 5–10 tools, evals, observability, full deployment
- **Agentic Platform — $22K, 8 weeks** — Multi-agent architecture with router, shared memory, reusable tool library, admin surface, full eval pipeline in CI
- **Custom Agentic System — from $30K** — Longer-horizon work, domain-specific; vetted contractor brought in if scope genuinely needs it

## How engagements run

1. **Scoping call** — 30 min, free. If it's not a fit, I'll tell you on the call.
2. **Written SOW + 50% upfront** — fixed scope, fixed price, fixed timeline.
3. **Weekly shipped demos** — every Friday, Loom walkthrough + link to real running code.
4. **Production handoff on final 50%** — code in your repo, on your infra, 2-week bug-fix window, no retainer trap.

## Past work (anonymized)

- Agentic property-management assistant — US real estate, 2024
- Field-ops dispatch copilot — US facilities, 2024
- Agentic sales-call analysis — SaaS, 2024
- Construction-ops intelligence platform — US construction, 2023
- Agentic exam-prep tutor with PDF chat — EdTech, 2023

## Contact

Email: hassan@codantrix.com
Location: Lahore, Pakistan (GMT+5, working US & EU hours)
Billing: USD via Wise and Payoneer
